untranslatable_reason: Signal requires portfolio-level leverage ratio management (3x constant leverage on RMZ index tracking) and market close timing. These are position sizing and execution timing directives, not price/indicator-based entry/exit conditions. The allowed indicators are technical/price-based only and cannot express: (1) leverage ratio monitoring, (2) index tracking maintenance, (3) market close execution constraints. This requires portfolio construction logic outside the backtest engine's indicator-based rule system.
translation_notes: CHAN_AT_DRY_8 is a regime/portfolio management signal rather than a technical trading rule. Entry condition 'Portfolio is constructed to track RMZ at 3x' is a structural requirement, not a tradeable condition. Exit condition marked AUTHOR_SILENT provides no actionable trigger. Original source text does not correspond to this signal and contains no usable trading logic.
